<!--
Thanks for contributing to Chronicle!
Before submitting, please ensure:
- [ ] Tests pass locally (`bun test`)
- [ ] Typecheck passes (`bun run typecheck`)
- [ ] Biome is clean (`bun run lint`)
- [ ] A changeset is added (`bun run changeset`) if this changes user-facing behavior
-->

## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences: what does this PR do and why? -->

## Related issue

<!-- e.g. "Closes #123" or "Relates to #456". If none, explain context. -->

Closes #

## Type of change

<!-- Check one. -->

- [ ] Bug fix (`fix`)
- [ ] New feature (`feat`)
- [ ] Breaking change (`feat!` or `fix!`)
- [ ] Documentation (`docs`)
- [ ] Refactor (`refactor`)
- [ ] Performance (`perf`)
- [ ] Test-only (`test`)
- [ ] Build / CI (`build` / `ci`)
- [ ] Chore (`chore`)

## How was this tested?

<!--
Describe the testing you did. For example:
- Added unit tests in `packages/engine/test/xyz.test.ts`
- Ran `bun test` — all 142 tests pass
- Manually verified via `bun run dev --scenario=dinner-party` for 50 ticks
-->

## Screenshots / demos

<!-- For UI changes, attach before / after screenshots or a short screen recording. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Commits follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
- [ ] New public APIs have JSDoc comments and exported types
- [ ] Changeset added (or this PR is labeled `skip-changeset` with justification)
- [ ] No new dependencies added without discussion — or justified below
- [ ] Docs updated under `docs/` if architecture or user-facing behavior changed
- [ ] Self-review completed — no debug logs, commented-out code, or unrelated changes

## Architectural notes

<!--
If this PR touches package boundaries, the rule system, the agent runtime,
or persistence — briefly explain your design choice. One paragraph is plenty.
Link to an ADR under docs/adr/ if you introduced a new one.
-->

## Follow-ups

<!-- Anything deferred to a later PR? Mention it and (optionally) open an issue. -->
